memoryArtifacts.headline: Affeton Manor / Castle, Worlington, Devonshire, England
memoryArtifacts.description:
Manor of Affeton
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

 "Affeton Castle", the gatehouse of the former manor house of Affeton, restored to a private residence in 1868-9.
 
Affeton is a former historic manor in Devon. It was at one time also a parish with its own parish church, but was later merged into the parish of West Worlington. The manor house was almost entirely demolished in the Civil War, the only part left standing was the gatehouse, which fell into ruin. A large farmhouse known as "Affeton Barton" was soon after built over the foundations and cellars of the manor house. The ruinous gatehouse was converted in 1868-9 to a shooting box for the use of the Stucley family of Hartland Abbey and Moreton House, Bideford, and became known thereafter as "Affeton Castle".

zh.West Worlington, Devon, England: 英國戴文韋斯特 沃林頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Stucley於1398年出生在英國薩默塞特特倫特時，他的父親Richard Stuckley31歲，母親Elizabeth FitzRoger28歲。他於大約1428年與Katherine Affeton在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1448年在英國戴文被列為sheriff of devon, lord of the manor of affeton。他去世於1467年3月26日在英國戴文韋斯特 沃林頓享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Stucley于1398年出生在英国薩默塞特特倫特时，他的父亲Richard Stuckley31岁，母亲Elizabeth FitzRoger28岁。他于大约1428年与Katherine Affeton在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1448年在英国戴文被列为sheriff of devon, lord of the manor of affeton。他去世于1467年3月26日在英国戴文韋斯特 沃林頓享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stucley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name primarily from Stukeley (Hunts), recorded as Stivecle in 1086, but occasionally from Stewkley (Bucks), recorded as Stiuecelea in 1183.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Stucley was born in 1398, in Trent, Somerset, England, his father, Richard Stuckley, was 31 and his mother, Elizabeth FitzRoger, was 28. He married Katherine Affeton about 1428, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. In 1448, at the age of 50, his occupation is listed as sheriff of devon, lord of the manor of affeton in Devon, England. He died on 26 March 1467, in West Worlington, Devon, England, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Stucley est né en 1398, à Trent, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Richard Stuckley, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth FitzRoger, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Affeton environ 1428, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. En 1448, à l’âge de 50 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of devon, lord of the manor of affeton à Devon, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 26 mars 1467, à West Worlington, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Stucley 1398 in Trent, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Stuckley 31 und seine Mutter Elizabeth FitzRoger 28. Er hat um 1428 in Devon, England Katherine Affeton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1448, als er 50 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of devon, lord of the manor of affeton in Devon, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 26. März 1467 im Alter von 69 Jahren in West Worlington, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Stucley è nato il nel 1398 nel Trent, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Richard Stuckley, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth FitzRoger, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Affeton circa 1428, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1448, all'età di 50 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of devon, lord of the manor of affeton nel Devon, England. Morì il 26 marzo 1467, nel West Worlington, Devon, England, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Stucleyが1398年にイギリスソメルセトトレントで生まれた時，父Richard Stuckleyは31歳，母Elizabeth FitzRogerは28歳であった。約1428年にイギリスデボンでKatherine Affetonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1448年，50歳の時，イギリスデボンでの職業はsheriff of devon, lord of the manor of affetonと記録されている。彼は1467年3月26日にイギリスデボンウエスト ウオルリントンで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Stucley(이)가 1398년 영국 서머세트 트렌트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Stuckley(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth FitzRoger(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1428년 영국 데폰에서 Katherine Affeton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1448년, 50세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 데폰에서 sheriff of devon, lord of the manor of affeton이었다. 그는 1467년 3월 26일 영국 데폰 웨스트 워링턴에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Trent, Somerset, England, United Kingdom: Trent, Bro an Hañv, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Stucley nasceu em 1398, em Trent, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Stuckley, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth FitzRoger, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Affeton aproximadamente 1428, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1448, com 50 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of devon, lord of the manor of affeton em Devon, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 26 de março de 1467, em West Worlington, Devon, Inglaterra, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Stucley родился в 1398 г. в местности трент, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Stuckley было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth FitzRoger, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Affeton около 1428 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1448 году, в возрасте 50 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of devon, lord of the manor of affeton в местности девон, Англия. Он умер 26 марта 1467 г. в местности вест ворлингтон, девон, Англия в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Stucley nació en 1398, en Trent, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Stuckley, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Elizabeth FitzRoger, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Katherine Affeton aproximadamente 1428, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1448, a la edad de 50 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of devon, lord of the manor of affeton en Devon, Inglaterra. Murió el 26 de marzo de 1467, en West Worlington, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años.
